name: coffee
desc: Experience the richness of expertly brewed coffee crafted from ethically sourced beans. Each cup is roasted in small batches to deliver a smooth, balanced, and unforgettable flavor in every sip.

categories.name: Aren Latte
categories.description: Smooth espresso blended with fresh milk and natural palm sugar for a sweet and creamy traditional taste.

categories.name: Avocado Latte
categories.description: Creamy avocado combined with rich espresso and milk, creating a smooth and unique tropical coffee flavor.

categories.name: Caramel Latte
categories.description: Classic latte mixed with sweet caramel syrup and topped with smooth milk foam.

categories.name: Dark Mokha
categories.description: Strong espresso blended with dark chocolate for a bold and rich coffee experience.

categories.name: Latte
categories.description: Smooth espresso combined with steamed milk for a creamy and balanced classic coffee.

categories.name: White Mokha
categories.description: Sweet white chocolate mixed with espresso and milk for a soft and creamy flavor.

name: avogato
desc: A perfect harmony of bold espresso and creamy indulgence. Our affogato selection brings together hot and cold sensations, creating a luxurious dessert experience in every spoonful.

categories.name: Caramel Affogato
categories.description: Vanilla ice cream topped with hot espresso and caramel sauce for a sweet and bold dessert coffee.

categories.name: Classic Affogato
categories.description: A scoop of vanilla ice cream served with a shot of hot espresso for a perfect hot and cold combination.

categories.name: Mocha Affogato
categories.description: Chocolate ice cream topped with espresso for a rich and creamy dessert coffee.

categories.name: Pistachio Affogato
categories.description: Pistachio ice cream poured with hot espresso, creating a nutty, sweet, and bold flavor.

name: fruity
desc: Bright, vibrant, and refreshing—our fruity coffee blends combine bold espresso with natural fruit flavors, delivering a unique twist that’s both energizing and delightfully refreshing.

categories.name: Butter Cream Americano
categories.description: Fresh americano topped with creamy butter foam for a smooth and rich refreshing taste.

categories.name: Passion Fruit Coffee
categories.description: Cold coffee mixed with fresh passion fruit for a sweet, sour, and refreshing drink.

categories.name: pomegranete wishkey coffee
categories.description: Sparkling coffee mixed with pomegranate flavor for a bold and fruity refreshment.

name: seasoning
desc: Where creativity meets flavor. Our seasoning series features bold and innovative combinations, blending unexpected ingredients into unique beverages that surprise and delight every palate.

categories.name: Black Sessame Latte
categories.description: Creamy latte blended with roasted black sesame for a nutty and rich flavor.

categories.name: Camaro Caramel Latte
categories.description: Smooth espresso mixed with sweet caramel and creamy milk for a soft and comforting taste.

categories.name: Cotton Candy Cocoa
categories.description: Sweet chocolate drink with cotton candy flavor for a fun and unique dessert beverage.

categories.name: Raw Chesee Latte
categories.description: Creamy latte topped with soft cheese foam for a rich and savory-sweet flavor.

name: smoothies
desc: Made from real fruits and blended to perfection, our smoothies offer a refreshing escape with every sip—smooth, creamy, and naturally satisfying.

categories.name: Banana Smoothies
categories.description: Fresh banana blended with milk and ice for a creamy and refreshing drink.

categories.name: Blueberry Smoothies
categories.description: Sweet blueberry blended with milk for a smooth and refreshing fruity taste.

categories.name: Cookies and Cream Smoothies
categories.description: Creamy milkshake blended with cookies for a sweet and rich dessert drink.

categories.name: Dragonfruit Smoothies
categories.description: Fresh dragonfruit blended with ice for a light and refreshing tropical drink.

categories.name: Manggo Smoothies
categories.description: Sweet mango blended with milk for a thick and refreshing smoothie.

categories.name: Melon Smoothies
categories.description: Fresh melon blended with milk and ice for a light and smooth drink.

name: cookies
desc: Freshly baked with premium ingredients, our cookies deliver the perfect balance of texture and flavor—crispy on the outside, soft on the inside, and irresistibly delicious.

categories.name: Almond Cookies
categories.description: Crunchy cookies with roasted almond for a rich nutty flavor.

categories.name: Cheese Cookies
categories.description: Soft cookies with cheesy flavor for a savory and sweet combination.

categories.name: Falaha cocolate Cookies
categories.description: Chocolate cookies with rich cocoa flavor for a sweet dessert snack.

categories.name: Lottus Cookies
categories.description: Soft cookies with caramel biscuit flavor for a sweet and crunchy bite.

categories.name: Matcha Cookies
categories.description: Green tea cookies with soft texture and mild sweet flavor.

categories.name: Medde Cookies
categories.description: Crunchy cookies with roasted cashew nuts for a rich taste.

categories.name: Oreo Cookies
categories.description: Chocolate cookies mixed with Oreo pieces for a sweet dessert snack.

categories.name: Peanut Cookies
categories.description: Classic peanut cookies with crunchy texture and sweet taste.

categories.name: Almond Redvelvet Cookies
categories.description: Red velvet cookies topped with almond for a sweet and premium flavor.
